<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep it focused and reviewable. -->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Type
- [ ] New skill / agent / standard / template
- [ ] Knowledge entry (decision / pattern / lesson / playbook / reference)
- [ ] Docs / fix / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or `.env`/`secrets/` content in the diff.
- [ ] No personal/employer/client names or absolute home paths.
- [ ] New skills are added to the `AGENTS.md` skill list.
- [ ] Conventional-commit messages; one logical change per commit.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [MIT License](../LICENSE).
